items.description: Generates novel hypotheses from accumulated bus history during quiet periods.
items.readme: Dreaming reviews recent bus history during quiet periods and drafts structured hypotheses through the protocol's constrained LLM path. It is the repo's low-frequency ideation loop, gated by novelty and schema validation.

items.description: Modulates other modules' setpoints based on aggregate health snapshots.
items.readme: Endocrine listens for aggregate health snapshots and adjusts module setpoints in response. It provides a first autonomous regulation loop so System Zero can dampen noisy behavior and react to unhealthy states.

items.description: Reads .sz/repo-profile.json and executes a per-language run command if today's expected output is missing.

run_command.description: Override; if empty, derived from repo-profile.

expected_output_glob.description: Override; if empty, derived from repo-profile.

items.readme: Goal Runner is the bridge between Repo Genesis and repository action. It reads the S0 repo profile, derives a simple per-language run command, and invokes it on tick only when today's expected output is missing.

items.description: Periodic pulse marker. The minimum living signal.
items.readme: Heartbeat is the minimum living signal for a static System Zero repository. It emits a pulse event on each tick and records a lightweight memory trace so other modules can tell that the repo is active.

Immune watches the repository's event stream for simple anomaly signals and emits normalized anomaly events. It gives downstream modules a shared first layer of passive health detection without coupling them to the host.

items.description: Rotates the bus log; archives older files.

rotate_after_days.description: Rotate when older than N days.

rotate_after_mb.description: Rotate when larger than N MB.

items.readme: Metabolism keeps the append-only bus usable over time by rotating and archiving old event logs. It preserves the protocol's JSONL discipline while preventing long-running repositories from accumulating unbounded operational weight.

items.description: Predicts the next likely event type from recent bus history.
items.readme: Prediction reads recent bus history and emits the next likely event types. It gives other modules a simple forecast signal they can use to prepare before repeated patterns turn into failures.

items.description: Aggregates anomalies into colored health snapshots.
items.readme: Subconscious turns anomaly events into a compact health snapshot. It aggregates recent signals into green, amber, or red state so regulators and operators can react to repo health through one stable capability.
